_README: Merge the entries you want into your project .mcp.json (or run `claude mcp add`). Values below are researched best-effort (2026-06) but still verify each against the vendor's current docs — endpoints and package names drift. Most are hosted remote servers (sign-in on first connect, nothing to store). The two stdio servers need a local package; put any API key in your shell env, never in this file. Kept separate from the live .mcp.json (umbriel/diffgate/memex) so it can't disrupt this repo's own servers.

granola._note: Meeting notes fed to Claude. Official hosted server (Streamable HTTP). Get your URL from granola.ai → MCP. Sign-in on first connect.

slack._note: Reads channels, posts updates. Official Slack hosted MCP — enable in your workspace, then paste the URL. Sign-in on first connect.

notion._note: Reads/writes your docs. Official remote server (makenotion/notion-mcp-server). Hosted endpoint; sign-in on first connect.

kondo._note: Triages LinkedIn DMs. Hosted Streamable HTTP (Business plan). Get your URL from docs.trykondo.com/mcp-setup.

zapier._note: 9,000+ apps via one connection. Generate your personal hosted URL in Zapier (zapier.com/mcp) and paste it.

higgsfield._note: Cinematic video from a prompt. Hosted server, streamable-http, sign-in on connect (no key stored).

perplexity._note: Live web search. Local stdio server (perplexityai/modelcontextprotocol). Set PERPLEXITY_API_KEY in your shell before launch; do not inline it here.

agent-browser._note: Token-light browser automation (Vercel agent-browser). Local stdio; may fetch a Rust CLI on first run. Confirm the current package name.
